content: We can frame language learning lexical reflexion (the vocabulary-focused metacognition from high school English curricula) as a human-domain Self-Refine loop, where learners iteratively refine their own grasp of word usage by reflecting on contextual gaps in their initial understanding, just as LLMs improve outputs via structured self-feedback in AI's Self-Refine framework. This means AI's iterative self-improvement architecture is already implicitly mirrored in how humans deliberately build lexical mastery, rather than being a wholly new AI invention.
